---
title: "MLE Interview Prep"
subtitle: "ML coding & problem-solving notes for machine-learning engineer interviews."
toc: false
---

A collection of from-scratch implementations and notes covering the math,
classical ML, deep learning, modern architectures, and production topics that
commonly come up in machine-learning engineer interviews. Each page is a
self-contained, runnable notebook.

## Foundations

- [Matrix Calculus](matrix_calculus.qmd) — derivatives, layouts, and the shapes of gradients
- [Naive Bayes](naive-bayes.ipynb)
- [Gaussian Mixture Models](gaussian-mixture.ipynb)

## Classical ML

- [Linear Regression](ml-coding/1-linear-regression.ipynb)
- [Logistic Regression](ml-coding/2-logistic-regression.ipynb)
- [Softmax Regression](ml-coding/3-softmax-regression.ipynb)
- [K-Nearest Neighbors](ml-coding/4-knn.ipynb)
- [Decision Tree](ml-coding/5-decision-tree.ipynb)
- [K-Means](ml-coding/6-kmeans.ipynb)
- [Principal Component Analysis](ml-coding/7-principal-component-analysis.ipynb)

## Deep Learning

- [Artificial Neural Networks](ml-coding/8-ann.ipynb)
- [Convolution](ml-coding/9-convolution.ipynb)
- [Basic Modules](ml-coding/10-deep-learning-basic.ipynb)
- [Sampling Methods](ml-coding/11-sampling.ipynb)
- [Loss Functions](ml-coding/12-loss-function.ipynb)
- [Optimizers](ml-coding/13-optimizer.ipynb)
- [Training Loops](ml-coding/14-training.ipynb)

## Architectures & Generative Models

- [Transformer](ml-coding/15-transformer.ipynb)
- [LLaMA](ml-coding/16-llama.ipynb)
- [Diffusion & Flow Matching](ml-coding/17-diffusion.ipynb)
- [VQ-VAE](ml-coding/18-vq-vae.ipynb)
- [Reinforcement Learning](ml-coding/19-reinforcement-learning.ipynb)

## Evaluation & Production

- [Metrics](ml-coding/20-metrics.ipynb)
- [Ensemble Learning](ml-coding/21-ensembling.ipynb)
- [Deployment Basics](ml-coding/22-deployment-basics.ipynb)
- [Distributed Training Pipeline](ml-coding/23-distributed-training-pipeline.ipynb)
